title: Mr. Moto Takes a Vacation
writer: Philip MacDonald, Norman Foster, John P. Marquand
actors: Peter Lorre, Joseph Schildkraut, Lionel Atwill
plot: Disguised as an Austrian archaeologist, Moto helps unearth the priceless crown of the legendary Queen of Sheba and sans disguise defends it from a variety of thugs and criminals.
